final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary campaign.

Style/medium: needs a festive e-commerce campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be vertical poster layout with clear visual hierarchy for promotional headline
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 brand identity and 618 anniversary campaign theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a celebratory tech-brand atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, high-energy festive mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 绿联 brand green and 618 promotional energy — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (large, primary), "周年庆" (secondary)
Constraints: must read as an e-commerce announcement poster; brand name and 618 must be visually prominent
Avoid:
